args.sql:
SELECT id, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;POLYGON((//placeholder))')) = true
LIMIT 1;

args.sql:
-- Get storm-flood polygons within the Kristiansand municipality envelope
SELECT objid, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, vannstandovernn2000, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS geom, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS bbox_wkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
-- Get storm-flood polygons within the Kristiansand municipality envelope

FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teig.objid, teig.teigid, teig.kommunenummer, teig.omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig AS teig
WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teig.objid, teig.teigid, teig.kommunenummer, teig.omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig AS teig
WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
